name: Spehar

movements.notes: partition the thrusters, pull-ups, and run as needed

description: A large-volume chipper of 100 heavy thrusters, 100 chest-to-bar pull-ups, and a 6-mile run, partitioned however the athlete chooses.
source_notes: crossfit.com/benchmark/spehar (official CrossFit Hero WOD page), retrieved 2026-07-09
